findings.description: Digital signature metadata rendered as visible text in the HTML, inserting content not visually present in the PDF into the reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows only 'From: Elizabeth S. Werner / Division of Waste Management / Raleigh Central Office' followed by the Subject line. The HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner', 'DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Soild Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US', and 'Date: 2016.04.28 10:23:05 -04'00'' between the From and Subject fields, disrupting reading order with content not visible in the PDF rendering.

findings.description: The handwritten signature image of Elizabeth S. Werner visible in the PDF (next to the 'From:' field on page 1) is missing from the HTML. The digital signature metadata text is faithfully reproduced, but the actual signature graphic has no corresponding tag.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a cursive/handwritten signature graphic between 'From: Elizabeth S. Werner' and the digital signature metadata block. The HTML renders only the textual digital signature metadata ('Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner…') without an for the handwritten signature.
